question_text: Which of these is the best example of an electromagnet being used in modern technology?

options.label: A
options.text: A permanent magnet holding a photo on a refrigerator

options.label: B
options.text: A relay in a car starter motor that switches high current on and off

options.label: D
options.text: Iron filings arranged around a bar magnet

explanation: A relay is an electromagnet-based device that uses a small current to switch a larger current on or off. It's essential in car starter motors and many other technologies. The other options involve permanent magnets or are just demonstrations, not practical applications of electromagnets.
